chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 271 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Haring of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.1927/2021 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.1928/2021 (1 Rule 10) 4. For hearing of CMA No.1139/2021 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 22-09-2025 Mr. Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioners, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
